name: The Orbital Freight Elevator
description: Unlock the grounded elevator car by melting the locking mechanism with friction fire.

flaws.name: Spoof Negative Mass
flaws.flavor_text: Spoof the faulty weight sensor into calibrating negative mass.

flaws.name: Deploy Emergency Brakes
flaws.flavor_text: Force emergency brake deployment. On negative mass, they clamp violently, causing extreme friction that ignites the rusted fluid line and melts the lock.
